article_theme: The InferenceXv2 benchmark reveals that while AMD's MI355X shows competitive single-node and FP8 performance, Nvidia's rack-scale GB300 NVL72 and mature software stack (TRTLLM, Dynamo) maintain a dominant lead in multi-node, composable, and high-throughput AI inference, highlighting the critical importance of software and disaggregated serving in modern LLM deployments.
structure_summary: The article begins by introducing the open-source InferenceXv2 benchmark, followed by a technical primer on LLM inference concepts (parallelism, interactivity vs. throughput). It then dives deep into benchmark results for DeepSeek R1 and GPT-OSS 120B, comparing Nvidia and AMD across various configurations (FP4/FP8, single/multi-node, Disagg, WideEP). The latter half critically analyzes software ecosystems (TRT-LLM, SGLang, ATOM), unit economics, and hardware TCO, concluding with repository updates and future roadmaps.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Establishes the context, authors, and high-level technical scope of the article.
translation_notes: Retain industry-standard English acronyms (GB300 NVL72, WideEP, SGLang).
Maintain the authoritative, premium tone suitable for a senior technical audience.

Ensure 'drop a star' is localized naturally for GitHub contexts (e.g., '点亮 Star').

sections.title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.previous_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Acts as a structural bridge, warning readers of incoming technical definitions.

sections.title: Interactivity vs Throughput Tradeoff
sections.previous_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.next_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Defines the core metric tradeoff in LLM inference, which is central to all subsequent charts.
translation_notes: Use precise terminology: 'Interactivity' (交互性/生成速度), 'Throughput' (吞吐量), 'Time per output token/TPOT' (每个输出token的时间), 'Disaggregated prefill' (Prefill/预填充与Decode/解码分离).

sections.title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the three main parallelism strategies (TP, EP, DP) and their respective overheads.
translation_notes: Standardize terms: TP (张量并行), EP (专家并行), DP (数据并行), 'all-reduce' (全归约), 'all-to-all collective' (全对全集合通信), 'MoE sparsity' (MoE稀疏性).

sections.title: Tracking Improvements Over Time
sections.previous_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the methodology of continuous benchmarking against fast-moving software updates.
translation_notes: The notation 'O(yearly)' and 'O(weekly)' uses Big O notation for order of magnitude. Translate as '以年为数量级/周期' and '以周为数量级/周期', or retain the O() notation for hardcore tech readers.

sections.title: DeepSeek R1
sections.section_role: Analyzes AMD's rapid software progress on the DeepSeek R1 model over a short timeframe.
translation_notes: Translate 'upstreamed' as '合并到上游/推送到上游'.
Translate 'forked SGLang images' as 'SGLang 分支镜像'.

sections.title: GPT-OSS 120B
sections.section_role: Highlights benchmark results for GPT-OSS 120B, showing more modest improvements for AMD.
translation_notes: Translate 'marginal improvements' as '边际提升' or '微小改进'.
Translate 'across the board' as '全面' or '整体上'.

sections.title: Disaggregated Inference Frameworks
sections.section_role: Introduces the specific software frameworks used for disaggregated inference by Nvidia and AMD.
translation_notes: Translate 'KV cache offloading' as 'KV Cache 卸载'.
Translate 'inference-engine agnostic' as '与推理引擎无关/兼容多种推理引擎'.

sections.title: DeepSeek Disagg +WideEP Results Deep Dive
sections.section_role: Analyzes the performance superiority of disaggregated inference over aggregated setups.
translation_notes: Translate 'framemogs' as '绝对碾压' or '降维打击'.
Ensure clear distinction between 'aggregated inference' (聚合推理) and 'disaggregated' (分离式).

sections.title: Nvidia versus AMD Disagg Prefill
sections.section_role: The climax of the benchmark comparison, showing the Pareto frontiers where Nvidia decisively beats AMD.
translation_notes: Ensure 'Pareto frontier' is strictly '帕累托前沿'.
Keep 'MTP' as an acronym but ensure the context of 'Multi-Token Prediction' (多Token预测) is clear.
